title: Allow editing already-uploaded Analysis video titles to be blank/empty

requirements.summary: Update the admin Video Management Panel to make the title field optional, remove client-side validation that prevents saving empty titles, and add helper text indicating that leaving the title blank will auto-generate a default title.
acceptanceCriteria: The title input field in the video management panel does not show a validation error when left empty.
Submitting an empty title does not block the save action.
A helper label near the title field reads something like: 'Optional – leave blank to auto-generate a title.'
After saving an empty title, the video row reflects the auto-generated title returned from the backend.

file_operations.description: Remove any client-side validation that prevents saving an empty or whitespace-only title in the inline title-editing UI. Update the title input field to display helper text in English indicating that the title is optional (e.g., 'Optional – leave blank to auto-generate a title'). Ensure that when a user clears the title and saves, the component calls the backend updateVideoTitle function with an empty string and refreshes the video list to display the auto-generated title returned from the backend.
